ops.text:
CARD REVISED TO v1.1 (2026-07-20, in place at instrument-card-v1.{md,json} — filename kept so harness consumers stay current; sidecar version field now 1.1 with revision_history).

Folded in: (1) E16 completion — bias factors MEASURED, headline defect #4 resolved: no length/position/style flag on binary is_steering; single tentative flag = style paraphrase on category labels (+8.1pp over control, CI [0.00, 0.17] touches zero; needs N→160 or ×3 to confirm). (2) Measured-rho paired MDEs — E27 rho 0.865 → 0.0168, E28 rho 0.698 → 0.0237; practical paired MDE range 0.017–0.024 on the n=628 frame, so the v1 rho 0.9/0.99 rows are optimistic for cross-training-run comparisons. (3) New §4e: contested-stratum judge accuracy — v6 = 0.800 on the 125-row E19.B panel; GEPA-evolved c003-m2 paired NULL (trades boundary errors across strata, does not remove them; op_dir↔direction boundary confirmed definitional). (4) New §7b: three verdicts issued UNDER the card, all verify-lane recomputed — E27 ACTIONABLE degradation −0.0254 (first delta ever resolved on these frames), E28 within noise floor −0.0128, E19.B within noise floor −0.008. (5) Gaps narrowed: #1 bias-factors → style-category-tentative only; #4 paired-DeLong blind spot → production-code-only (E27/E28 harnesses demonstrate the full pattern; port it into sweep/promotion persistence).
